title: Catching Up with an Old Friend
description: Run into someone you haven't seen in ages. Heavy on idioms and casual register — 'hey stranger', 'no kidding', 'long time no see'.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Hey stranger! Long time no see. How've you been?

templates.text: Sam! Wow, it's been ages. I'm doing pretty good, you?
templates.hint_zh: Sam!天啊,好久不見。我還不錯,你呢?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Can't complain. Same old, same old. Still working at the same place?

templates.text: Nah, I jumped ship last year. Working remote now, way better.
templates.hint_zh: 沒,我去年跳槽了。現在遠端工作,好太多了。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: No kidding! Good for you. I keep saying I'll do it but never get around to it.

templates.text: You should pull the trigger, honestly. Best decision I ever made.
templates.hint_zh: 說真的你該下定決心做。是我做過最好的決定。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yeah, yeah, I hear you. Hey, want to grab a coffee real quick?

templates.text: I wish I could, but I'm running late. Rain check?
templates.hint_zh: 好想去,但我快遲到了。下次補?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course. Shoot me a text and we'll set something up.

templates.text: Will do. Great running into you, take care!
templates.hint_zh: 一定。很高興遇到你,保重!

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You too, buddy. Catch you later!
